key_risks: High R&D investment, high operating risk, unstable performance, and high delisting risk characteristic of STAR Market (Sci-Tech Innovation Board) companies

The general robotics industry is technology-intensive and R&D-driven; software and hardware technology development and application exploration are still in the early rapid development stage, with uncertain commercialization prospects
Risks related to the issuer's own operations, including potential inability to maintain competitive advantages in high-performance general-purpose robots
Risks related to the industry, including intense market competition from domestic and international robotics companies
Risk of technology iteration and obsolescence — rapid innovation cycles in AI and embodied intelligence may render existing products or technologies outdated
Risk of reliance on key personnel, particularly in AI, motion control, and perception interaction R&D teams; loss of core talent could adversely affect operations
Overseas market risk — a significant portion of revenue relies on international markets, exposing the company to geopolitical, trade policy, and foreign exchange risks
Risk of performance instability — future revenues and profits may fluctuate significantly due to market demand changes, product iteration cycles, and competitive dynamics
Supply chain and procurement risks — dependence on key component suppliers; supply disruptions could affect production capacity and delivery
Risk that raised funds may not be deployed as planned or that investment projects may not achieve expected returns
Dual-class share structure and special voting rights arrangement may concentrate control in the hands of the actual controller, limiting minority shareholder influence
Delisting risk associated with STAR Market listing standards

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Model Research and Development Project
projects.focus: R&D of embodied intelligence models, reinforcement learning, high-precision control, and frontier AI algorithms to strengthen core intelligent capabilities

projects.name: Robot Body Research and Development Project
projects.focus: R&D of humanoid robot and quadruped robot hardware bodies, improving motion performance, robustness, and anti-impact capabilities

projects.name: New Intelligent Robot Product Development Project
projects.focus: Development of new types of intelligent robot products to enrich the product matrix and expand application scenarios

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Manufacturing Base Construction Project
projects.focus: Construction of a scaled and intelligent manufacturing system to improve industrialization capacity and production efficiency
